tasks.subject: Task 1: Retire old synthetic Modul 1 content
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the synthetic-admissions labs, generator, and CSVs so only the new COVID storyline remains.

**Files:** Delete modul-1-power-bi/lab/** (7 labs + img/.gitkeep), data/jana_data.py, disiplin.csv, kemasukan.csv, tarikh.csv, wad.csv; Create modul-1-power-bi/img/.gitkeep.

**Verify:** `ls modul-1-power-bi/lab 2>/dev/null; ls modul-1-power-bi/data` -> lab absent; no synthetic CSVs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-1-power-bi/lab", "modul-1-power-bi/data/jana_data.py", "modul-1-power-bi/img/.gitkeep"], "verifyCommand": "ls modul-1-power-bi/lab 2>/dev/null; ls modul-1-power-bi/data", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lab/ removed", "no synthetic CSVs or jana_data.py", "img/.gitkeep exists"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Data fetch script + pinned local datasets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reproducible fetch_data.py downloading 3 datasets to committed CSVs with validated row counts.

**Files:** Modify pyproject.toml (duckdb>=1.0); Create modul-1-power-bi/data/fetch_data.py; generate covid_deaths_linelist.csv, covid_cases.csv, population_state.csv.

**Verify:** `python modul-1-power-bi/data/fetch_data.py` -> prints `covid_deaths_linelist: 37351 rows`, exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "modul-1-power-bi/data/fetch_data.py", "modul-1-power-bi/data/covid_deaths_linelist.csv", "modul-1-power-bi/data/covid_cases.csv", "modul-1-power-bi/data/population_state.csv"], "verifyCommand": "python modul-1-power-bi/data/fetch_data.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["script writes 3 CSVs", "covid_deaths_linelist.csv has 37351 rows", "population pre-filtered to overall", "prints row counts"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Theory slide deck (English, Marp)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite slides/modul-1-power-bi.md in English (~14 slides incl. 5-types-of-analytics), render PDF, fix slides README.

**Files:** Rewrite slides/modul-1-power-bi.md; regenerate slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf; modify slides/README.md.

**Verify:** `npx -y @marp-team/marp-cli slides/modul-1-power-bi.md --pdf -o slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf` -> exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["slides/modul-1-power-bi.md", "slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf", "slides/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "npx -y @marp-team/marp-cli slides/modul-1-power-bi.md --pdf -o slides/build/modul-1-power-bi.pdf", "acceptanceCriteria": ["English deck with Marp front-matter", "5-types-of-analytics slide present", "covers BI/why/workflow/views/data-model/measure/data/ethics/preview/ground-rules", "renders to PDF without error"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Hands-on follow-along guide
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create modul-1-power-bi/hands-on-guide.md — complete English follow-along build using canonical artifacts, 5 build parts, checkpoints, facilitator pacing.

**Files:** Create modul-1-power-bi/hands-on-guide.md.

**Verify:** grep -c Vaccination_Status >=2; grep -c 'Deaths per 100k' >=1; grep -c 'Mark as date table' >=1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-1-power-bi/hands-on-guide.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'Vaccination_Status' modul-1-power-bi/hands-on-guide.md; grep -c 'Deaths per 100k' modul-1-power-bi/hands-on-guide.md; grep -c 'Mark as date table' modul-1-power-bi/hands-on-guide.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 build parts in order", "exact PQ custom-column formulas", "Dim_State + Dim_Date + mark-as-date + 4 relationships", "all 10 DAX measures verbatim", "6 core visuals + 4 slicers + optional showcase", "6 named checkpoints", "facilitator pacing note"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rewrite Modul 1 README (English)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite modul-1-power-bi/README.md in English: theory + follow-along structure, datasets, fetch instructions.

**Files:** Rewrite modul-1-power-bi/README.md.

**Verify:** grep -i 'jana_data|kemasukan|BOR|ALOS' -> none; grep -c hands-on-guide >=1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-1-power-bi/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -i 'jana_data\\|kemasukan\\|BOR\\|ALOS' modul-1-power-bi/README.md; grep -c 'hands-on-guide' modul-1-power-bi/README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["English; theory+follow-along split + timetable", "datasets + fetch_data.py documented", "links guide + slide deck", "data-safety + prerequisite link", "no stale synthetic refs"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Update screenshot manifest for new build
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace Modul 1 section of docs/SCREENSHOTS.md to list new follow-along guide screenshots in modul-1-power-bi/img/; leave Modul 2 untouched.

**Files:** Modify docs/SCREENSHOTS.md (Modul 1 table only).

**Verify:** grep -n 'lab/img|kemasukan|Tempoh_Tinggal' docs/SCREENSHOTS.md -> none.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/SCREENSHOTS.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'lab/img\\|kemasukan\\|Tempoh_Tinggal' docs/SCREENSHOTS.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Modul 1 table points at modul-1-power-bi/img/", "rows match new build steps", "no old lab refs"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
